subject: fix(a11y): add aria-label to BottomSheet, min-h-[44px] to DateInput
body:
BottomSheet had role="dialog" without aria-label — screen readers
couldn't announce what the dialog contains. Added optional ariaLabel
prop, passed as "Workspace actions" from WorkspaceDetailView.

DateInput was the only input component missing min-h-[44px] for
consistent 44px mobile touch targets.

Tags: a11y, ux, mobile
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
